"CMakeFiles/terminal-output.dir/USB_DEVICE/App/usb_device.c.o" "CMakeFiles/terminal-output.dir/USB_DEVICE/App/usbd_desc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/terminal-output.dir/USB_DEVICE/App/usbd_cdc_if.c.o"
